_about: Project-authored corrections for the engineers pipeline. Roster name-fixes are inherited from data/modifications-extra/corrections.json via bp_common. This file records verified editorial corrections and documents known coriolis-data discrepancies so audit-engineers.py omission warnings can be triaged.

applied_corrections._note: Applied to the cards (editorial.json) after the 2026-06-30 ultracode wiki-verification pass.
applied_corrections.petra-olmanova: Advanced Missile Rack -> Seeker Missile Rack (G5). The Advanced Missile Rack is engineered only by Liz Ryder + Juri Ishmaak (confirmed by the site's own blueprints.html advanced-missile-rack card); Olmanova engineers the standard/Seeker Missile Rack family.
applied_corrections.ram-tah: Hatch Breaker Limpet Controller G3 -> G4 (matches coriolis + the three sibling limpet controllers). Removed G1 Guardian Gauss/Plasma/Shard — those are Technology Broker unlocks, not Ram Tah engineering blueprints; Guardian weapons cannot be engineered.

known_coriolis_discrepancies._note: Verified page-correct; coriolis is the outlier. audit-engineers.py emits omission/grade warnings here that should be IGNORED (do not 'fix' the page toward coriolis).
known_coriolis_discrepancies.cargo_manifest_scanner_cs_group: coriolis group 'cs' (Cargo/Manifest Scanner) is over-broad: it wrongly attributes the scanner to Felicity Farseer + Hera Tani (who do not offer it) and over-grades Bill Turner / Lori Jameson / Juri Ishmaak / Lei Cheung to G5 (real cap G3, matching the parallel 'kw'/'ws' scanner groups). Page correctly omits/uses G3. Verified vs Fandom/EDSM/scotty/ed-board.
known_coriolis_discrepancies.caustic_sink_launcher: coriolis lists Caustic Sink Launcher (G5) for Petra Olmanova + Ram Tah, but Update 15 (May 2023) reclassified it as experimental/consumable — it is no longer engineerable by anyone. Page correctly omits it.
